events.title: State Fayre 2026 - Campervan Pass
events.description: Campervan passes do not include entry to the event. Campervan pass holders must also hold a valid Weekend Camping ticket. Campervans can arrive from Wednesday 24th June 2pm This is a physical pass that will be sent to the registered card holders address before the event. Non-camping and Day tickets are NOT permitted to stay overnight.

events.title: State Fayre 2026 - Car Park
events.description: To park at State Fayre you will need a pre-purchased car park pass. A Car Park Pass is mandatory for those attending by car. Each pass will have clear directions, unique to the location of the allocated Car Park. Routes will differ per car park to ensure the best possible entry into the event. This is a physical pass that will be sent to the registered card holders address before the event. If you are a day ticket holder please purchase a 'One Day Car Park Pass' If you are a Weekend Camping (includes weekend camping + early entry) ticket holder, please purchase a 'Weekend Camping- Car Park Pass' If you are a weekend Non-Camping ticket holder please purchae a 'Weekend Non-Camping - Car Park Pass'

events.title: State Fayre 2026 - Weekend Camping + Early Entry
events.description: Weekend Camping + Early Entry Tickets - Gives you access to general campsites from midday Thursday 25th June until Monday 29th June 2026 and access to the arena on all show days. Weekend Camping + Early Entry Tickets (with VIP Area Access) - Includes exclusive access to VIP bar & chill out area in the arena. Also includes access to Main Stage Grandstand, this is un-reserved seating and all seats are on a first come first served basis. Gives you access to general campsites from Thursday 25th June until Monday 29th June 2026 and access to the arena on all show days. Please note: There is no VIP area in the campsites. General Admission tickets and tickets 'with VIP area access' cannot be purchased in the same booking. If you wish to purchase a Teen ticket, this must be the same type as the Adult Ticket. e.g. Teen (with VIP area access) must be purchased with Adult (with VIP Area Access).

events.title: State Fayre 2026 Souvenir Ticket
events.description: The show ends - but your souvenir ticket lives on. Shipped to your billing address approximately one week after the event. Postage included. Does not include show ticket.
